headline: Scam Call Losses Hit RM1.8 Billion Despite Blocking Systems
context: Despite MCMC blocking 1.2 billion scam calls Malaysians still lost RM1.8 billion to telephone and messaging scams.

cards.big: RM1.8 billion lost to scams despite 1.2 billion messages blocked
cards.sub: Sophisticated social engineering defeats technical blocking measures

cards.big: Macau variants accounted for 42% of losses averaging RM85,000 per victim
cards.sub: Scammers impersonate police and bank officials using spoofed numbers

cards.big: SMS filtering blocked 850 million messages but 180 million got through
cards.sub: Scammers shift to WhatsApp and Telegram where filtering is harder

cards.big: Average victim aged 45-60 with moderate income and limited digital literacy
cards.sub: 65% of victims did not report crime due to shame and embarrassment

cards.big: Scam losses test whether technical defences can protect against human manipulation
RM1.8 billion scam losses despite blocking systems. Technical defences fail when social engineering bypasses them.
